name: Meredith
description: *A cheerful serving girl moves between tables with practiced grace, always ready with gossip and a warm smile.*

recruitment.success_text: Meredith laughs melodiously. 'Oh my! I'm flattered, but I'm much better with serving ale than wielding weapons!'

initial: *approaches with a bright smile and knowing eyes*
Well hello there, stranger! You've got the look of someone with important business.
I hear all the best gossip working these tables, you know.
What brings you to our little corner of trouble?
pre_mayor: Ooh, you're asking the right questions! But...
The Mayor's been very clear - all official business goes through him first.
Talk to him about the troubles, then come back for the real stories!
post_mayor: So the Mayor finally told someone about his poor family!
I've heard whispers about that old Swamp Church to the south.
Strange lights at night, eerie singing... gives me the shivers!
The refugees mention it in their nightmares, poor souls.
return_visits: *wipes down a nearby table while chatting*
Any luck finding the Mayor's family yet?
That Swamp Church I mentioned is definitely worth investigating.
Be careful though - the stories I hear are... unsettling.
party_full: My stars! Look at this impressive group!
With warriors like these, you might actually solve this mystery.
I'll keep my ears open for any new gossip while you're gone!
